# Attendance System

cd backend

uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload


cd frontend

npm run dev



# RDIF

{
  "emp_id": "AT0001",
  "type": "rfid",
  "data": "A1B2C3D4"
}

# FINGER

{
  "emp_id": "AT0001",
  "type": "finger",
  "index": 4,
  "data": "encoded_template"
}

# FACE 

{
  "emp_id": "AT0001",
  "type": "face",
  "index": 5,
  "data": "[0.12,0.34,0.56,0.78]",
  "image": ""
}




# download csv file http://localhost:8000/hardware/download/employees-csv
